ground_truth.title: Pest Control Discounts | Fresno, CA | Dustin Pest Control
ground_truth.main_content: Dustin Pest Control offers special promotions and discounts for pest control services in Central California. Current coupons include pest control deals with savings for customers. The company provides a $45/Month Pest Shield membership based on square footage of home. Military personnel, law enforcement, and firefighters receive special discounts as a thank you for their service. With over 40 years of experience, Dustin Pest Control handles all types of pests including ants, cockroaches, bed bugs, ticks, fleas, wasps, mosquitoes, and termites. The company serves multiple locations throughout the Central Valley including Fresno, Clovis, Merced, Visalia, Orange Cove, Kingsburg, and Fort Washington. Book a service online or call to schedule an appointment.
with: Hard on Pests; Easy on Your Wallet
